mapper.sql: select model_id, model_name, provider, base_url, api_key, model_type, status from sc_ai_model_config
mapper.select: and model_name like concat('%', #{modelName}, '%')and provider = #{provider}and model_type = #{modelType}and status = #{status} order by model_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_ai_model_config(model_name, provider, base_url, api_key, model_type, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{modelName}, #{provider}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_ai_model_config model_name = #{modelName},provider = #{provider},base_url = #{baseUrl},api_key = #{apiKey},model_type = #{modelType},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where model_id = #{modelId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_ai_model_config where model_id in #{modelId}
